name: @ont/adapter-indexer
description: ONT B4 adapter — the indexer (firewall-minting heart). Ingests confirmed block data and mints the chain-bound facts the audited B3 enforcement consumes (ConfirmedBatchAnchor + the fee-tx parts; later: committed-batch projection, availability leaves, recover-owner invoke). Recompute-don't-trust: a forged / withheld / non-canonical source mints no fact, so a B3 predicate cannot falsely accept. Decides nothing.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && vitest run
